name: usb-device-viewer
description: 跨平台USB HID设备查看工具

scripts.start: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH bun run vite:build && LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH bun run ./node_modules/.bin/electrobun dev
scripts.build: bun run vite:build && bun run ./node_modules/.bin/electrobun build
scripts.dev: LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH bun run vite:build && LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH bun run ./node_modules/.bin/electrobun dev
